negative_memory.hypothesis_tested: fold-local intraday streak fatigue reversal rank over streak length pressure, streak displacement stretch, body effort decay, close progression erosion, counter-wick rejection, participation fade, path efficiency loss, VWAP extension pressure, reversal commitment, session phase maturity, and spread stress inverse features
negative_memory.next_boundary: C0094 R0001 shows the tested streak fatigue reversal surface is not a candidate as implemented; remaining C0094 variants would be adjacent tuning, so next work should choose a new major C0095 hypothesis without selected, economics-pass, runtime, materialization, ONNX, promotion, or live claims
negative_memory.reason_not_candidate: activity landed inside the target band, but proxy, closed-bar MT5 logic, aggregate MT5 tick, and fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence did not establish a candidate

supporting_lessons.summary: R0001 produced 3 profitable and 6 losing fold-isolated MT5 tick folds, total tick net PnL -21.71, and worst fold rw_004 net PnL -8.62.
Schedule replay mechanical parity passed with mismatch_count 0, so the weak result is not explained by proxy-vs-MT5 logic mismatch.
Tick execution improved closed-bar logic by -1.66 total net PnL across 5 better and 4 worse folds, but both logic and tick surfaces remained negative.
Native MQL signal logic, ONNX materialization, cost/slippage hardening, final sizing, and historical lineage debt remain unresolved; no stronger claim is created.

required_kpi_summary.remaining_work_classification: no_candidate; further C0094 work would be adjacent threshold, stop, target, hold, session, activity, spread, capital, or streak-fatigue-reversal feature nudge tuning

hypothesis_variant.summary: fold-local intraday streak fatigue reversal rank run
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: C0094 R0001 tests whether recent directional streaks that show body-effort decay, close progression erosion, counter-wick rejection, participation fade, path-efficiency loss, and VWAP extension form a portable target-first reversal entry surface after realistic FPMarkets US100 spread cost. It changes feature family, label conditioning, model context, and trade-logic state key from C0093 participation pulse efficiency. It is not a threshold/window/SL/TP/session/spread/capital nudge, materialization step, ONNX step, selected claim, runtime claim, or retry-only run.

pre_open_decision.adjacent_tuning_rejection_reason: No C0093 thresholds, windows, stops, targets, sessions, spread gates, feature nudges, or capital sizing changes are used as the run question.
